nasb.text: He sent out His arrows, and scattered them, And lightning flashes in abundance, and routed them.

esv.text: And he sent out his arrows and scattered them; he flashed forth lightnings and routed them.

cnv.text: 他射出箭來，使它們四散； 他連連發出閃電，使它們混亂。

ccb.text: 祂射出利箭驱散仇敌， 发出闪电击溃他们。

csbs.text: 他发出箭矢，使仇敌分散； 发出众多闪电，使他们混乱。
